name: whatsapp-social-saas
description: SaaS de publication sur les réseaux sociaux via WhatsApp — squelette

scripts.dev: concurrently -n portal,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w portal" "npm run dev -w backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w portal && npm run build -w backend
scripts.db:reset: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c 'DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;' && npm run db:setup
